title: sarcopodium citrinocastaneum
intro: Sarcopodium citrinocastaneum, also known as the yellow castanet or yellow stinkwood, is a plant species that belongs to the family Apocynaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Sarcopodium citrinocastaneum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing. The plant is typically prepared as a tincture or infused in herbal teas for its medicinal uses.
